data.title: RED test: assert zero tdd-workflow references remain in codebase
data.description: Write tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh that asserts no tdd-workflow references remain in in-scope codebase. Executes grep -r tdd-workflow excluding .tickets-tracker, .git, and itself. Asserts count equals zero. Currently fails RED because refs exist. Negative constraint test per Behavioral Test Requirement.
